MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff 698 Bush Street is present. Represented by Jerry Deal.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ferminita Lopez is present.
Attorney Eunice Chang representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAR-11-2013 is vacated.
